contextprompt
How it works Features Pricing GitHub Get Started Free

Your meeting decides what to build.
contextprompt tells Claude Code how.

Paste a Zoom, Google Meet, or Teams link. The contextprompt bot joins your call, records and transcribes, then scans your repos and extracts structured coding tasks. Hand the output to Claude Code and ship.

Get started free

No API keys needed. Free plan includes 1 hour/month.

T1 Replace session tokens with JWT high 2 —

### T1: Replace session tokens with JWT in auth middleware
**Priority:** high
> "We need to swap out the session store before the compliance deadline" — Alice
**Files:** src/middleware/auth.ts, src/types/session.ts
Zoom, Google Meet & Teams · No API keys needed · Free plan included · 12 languages supported

See the difference

Same meeting. Two very different outcomes.

0:00
Current Process
contextprompt

How it works

No installs, no audio drivers, no API keys. Just paste a meeting link.

1

Connect your repos

Dashboard

Sign in with Google, then add your repos from the dashboard. contextprompt scans file paths, exports, and types.

2

Paste a meeting link

Bot joins your call

Alice The auth middleware needs JWT...

Bob Which files are we talking about?

Alice The main auth.ts and session types.

3

Get structured tasks

Replace session tokens with JWT high

src/middleware/auth.ts, src/types/session.ts

Add token refresh endpoint medium

src/routes/auth.ts

4

Hand tasks to Claude Code

Ready to execute

View tasks in the dashboard, or hand the output directly to Claude Code, Cursor, or any AI assistant.

Built for engineering teams

Zoom, Meet & Teams

The contextprompt bot joins your call like any other participant. Works with Zoom, Google Meet, and Microsoft Teams.

Repo-aware extraction

Scans your codebase for file paths, exports, function signatures, and types so tasks reference real code, not guesses.

Choose your Claude model

Sonnet, Opus, or Haiku depending on the depth you need. Pick the right balance of speed and intelligence.

12 languages

Transcription and task extraction in 12 languages. Your team speaks their language, contextprompt extracts the tasks.

GitHub issue integration

Analyze open issues against your repo structure and get implementation plans with file paths and steps.

Direct AI integration

Output is structured for Claude Code, Cursor, or any AI coding tool. Implementation steps, file paths, and transcript evidence included.

The meeting-to-code gap

No product does this today. Meeting tools don't understand code. Coding agents don't attend meetings. contextprompt is the glue.

"What exactly did they want changed?"

You replay 47 minutes of the call to find the 90 seconds that matter.

Every task includes the exact transcript quote that prompted it, attributed to the speaker.

"Which files does this touch?"

Someone said "the calendar component." Good luck mapping that to actual file paths.

contextprompt scans your connected repos and maps tasks to real files with confidence levels.

"How do I phrase this for Claude?"

You spend 15 minutes writing a prompt from memory, guessing at file paths.

Each task comes with implementation steps you can paste directly into Claude Code.

Simple pricing

No API keys needed. Everything is included — recording, transcription, and task extraction.

Free

$0

Get started with no commitment.

  • 1 hour/month of meeting recording
  • Repo-aware task extraction
  • All meeting platforms
  • All Claude models
  • Dashboard access
Get started free

Pro

$30 / mo

For teams that ship fast.

  • 15 hours/month of meeting recording
  • Everything in Free
  • GitHub issue integration
  • Priority support
  • Multi-language support

Start shipping.
